title: Multiple Coulomb Scattering in Lattice and Foam Detector Structures Beyond the Homogeneous-Slab Approximation: reproducible code and data
description: Reproducible Geant4 simulation and analysis framework for the study of multiple Coulomb scattering in porous low-mass detector structures (3D-printed lattices and reticulated carbon foams). Includes the Geant4 application, analytic and voxel geometry generators, a transport-aware ray-tracer, the cumulant-analysis and deconvolution pipeline, the figure-generation scripts, and the committed reduced results sufficient to regenerate every figure and table without new simulation. Code is released under the MIT License; the derived data products are released under CC BY 4.0.
